name: Candy Carson
subject: Ben just received this letter. I had to share it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27209638:26168142915:m:1:876315805:1D3C48955B46A8648CB9584BA0DA1C0B:r)
---
|

Peter, Ben just received the letter below from a little 8-year-old girl in in California named Nivaya, and I had to share it with you.

While we receive letters of support and encouragement all the time, this one is particularly heartwarming because it underscores why Ben has decided to explore a run for President.

It's about creating a better future for our children and grandchildren.

In mailing this letter, Nivaya's mother told us that while their family can only donate $20 a month, they're praying that God can multiply that many times over.

I'd love to tell Nivaya's mom that because we are blessed to have so many generous supporters like you, we were able to do just that. I'm sure she'd be thrilled to know that Nivaya's letter led to an outpouring of support for Ben as he determines whether or not to run.

[**Will you read Nivaya's letter below, and then make a donation to support Ben?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27209638:26168142915:m:1:876315805:1D3C48955B46A8648CB9584BA0DA1C0B:r)

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27209638:26168142915:m:1:876315805:1D3C48955B46A8648CB9584BA0DA1C0B:r)
---

Thank you, and I hope this letter warms your heart as much as it did ours.

Sincerely,
Candy Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27209638:26168142915:m:1:876315805:1D3C48955B46A8648CB9584BA0DA1C0B:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27209639:26168142915:m:1:876315805:1D3C48955B46A8648CB9584BA0DA1C0B:r)
---

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Momentum for our campaign is building!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
Hello Friend,

We've got some more great news to share with you from the Cruz for President HQ.

The latest round of national and early state polls show that Ted is firmly in the top tier of candidates only three weeks after he announced his candidacy for President. These polls clearly demonstrate that Republican primary voters are finding Ted's messages more compelling -- even with several more candidates having entered the race.

On Thursday, former General Electric CEO Jack Welch appeared on Fox News' Your World with Neil Cavuto where he had a few things to say about truth, leadership, and the 2016 presidential race. You'll want to hear what he had to say about Ted -- click here to watch it now <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nqKQgxY8AdY>.

Also this week, the campaign announced some astonishing fundraising numbers. In our first fundraising quarter -- from just March 23rd to midnight on March 31st -- Cruz for President raised $4.3 million with $3.9 million cash on hand. A total of 51,081 contributions were made from 46,871 individual donors across all 50 states. More than 300 donors gave the maximum amount of $2,700 and 95 percent of donations were less than $100. And we couldn't have done it without you!

Today, Ted is in New Hampshire, and this week he will visit New York, Nevada, and Iowa to continue rallying courageous conservatives all across our nation to rise up and reignite the promise of America.

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President

P.S. We'd especially like to thank the 22,397 of you who have signed up to volunteer with this campaign. If you haven't yet, please click here to add your name to the list. <https://www.tedcruz.org/volunteer/> With your help, we will win this race!
Press Clips

Greenville Online <http://www.greenvilleonline.com/story/news/politics/2015/04/18/ted-cruz-scott-walker-jeb-bush/25987009/>

Ted Cruz Takes on Hillary Clinton in N.R.A. Speech
New York Times <http://www.nytimes.com/politics/first-draft/2015/04/10/ted-cruz-takes-on-hillary-clinton-in-n-r-a-speech/?_r=0>

Ted Cruz campaign in Houston using advanced data-mining to target voters
ABC 11 <http://abc13.com/politics/cruz-campaign-using-advanced-data-mining-to-target-voters/659317/>

Ted Cruz: Rock Star
RedState <http://www.redstate.com/2015/04/16/ted-cruz-rock-star/?utm_source=dlvr.it&utm_medium=twitter>

Ted Cruz's early 2016 funding topples Romney, suggesting big-money race
The Guardian <http://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2015/apr/16/ted-cruz-presidential-campaign-donations-first-week>

Carolla: 'I Want to Support' Ted Cruz
Breitbart <http://www.breitbart.com/video/2015/04/17/carolla-i-want-to-support-ted-cruz/>

Rep. John Culberson endorses Cruz for president
Dallas Morning News <http://trailblazersblog.dallasnews.com/2015/04/culberson-endorses-cruz-for-president.html/>
CRUZ VIDEOS

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wwxMNckdNiE>

Courageous Conservatives

Reigniting the Promise of America

P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX 77265 | (713) 353-4330

name: Josh Wolf, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: FWD: Republicans attack Social Security. SIGN to stop them:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Patrick emailed you yesterday about something he cares about deeply.Hey -- Patrick emailed you yesterday about something he cares about deeply: protecting our Social Security program from extreme Republican attacks. The attacks are happening right now: Chris Christie, Marco Rubio, and other Tea Party Republicans are proposing to raise the retirement age. Florida can't let this happen. **So here 's the plan: We're launching a petition calling on Patrick's opponents to keep their hands off Social Security and say "NO" to raising the retirement age. [Click here to add your signature.](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27d7/738133e4/3983d570/7f9b8bb5/3343557730/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/protect-social-security?sc=ema_2015-04-18_b1_jw_ldnd")** [](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27d7/738133e4/3983d570/7f9b8bb5/3343557730/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/protect-social-security?sc=ema_2015-04-18_b1_jw_ldnd") **[murphyforflorida.com/protect-social-security](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27d7/738133e4/3983d570/7f9b8bb5/3343557730/VEsF/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/protect-social-security?sc=ema_2015-04-18_b1_jw_ldnd")** Thanks, Josh Wolf Campaign Manager
Murphy For Florida \---------Original Message--------- Date: Friday, April 17th, 2015
Subject: Republicans attack Social Security. SIGN to stop them: Friend -- Republicans have a dangerous plan in 2016: **Reshape Social Security from its New Deal origins into a shadow of its former self.** How? Chris Christie, Marco Rubio, and other Republicans are proposing raising the retirement age. These vicious cuts to Social Security hit middle class folks the hardest. As the next United States Senator from Florida, I'll fight to preserve and protect Social Security. You have my word. **Today, I 'm challenging the Tea Party candidates who will enter the U.S. Senate race over the coming weeks to join me, and say: "I oppose raising the Social Security retirement age." If you agree, please sign my petition:** **[Sign my petition challenging my opponents to keep their hands off of the Social Security retirement age>> ](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27d7/738133e4/3983d570/7f9b8bb5/3343557730/VEsC/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/protect-social-security?sc=ema_2015-04-18_b1_jw_ldnd")** The Tea Party has manufactured a crisis in Social Security so they can push through radical reforms that a strong majority of Americans, both Democrats and Republicans, oppose. I want to ensure our kids and grandkids will have Social Security when they need it. And I would do that by adjusting the payroll cap to make sure everyone pays their fair share, not by raising the retirement age and cutting benefits. I challenge my opponents in this race for U.S. Senate to say clearly to all Floridians, "I oppose raising the Social Security retirement age." **[Click here to join me.](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27d7/738133e4/3983d570/7f9b8bb5/3343557730/VEsD/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/protect-social-security?sc=ema_2015-04-18_b1_jw_ldnd")** Thanks, Patrick Murphy | **[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?refcode=ema_2015-04-18_b1_jw_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27d7/738133e4/3983d570/7f9b8bb7/3343557730/VEsB/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
